title: Fast Fiction Factory Claim Ledger Workbench
purpose: Local-first Visual Review Hub extension that adds a reviewable Claim Ledger for source, truth status, reality/reference status, canon risk, unresolved dependencies, viewer disclosure, spoiler protection, grouping, filtering, and claim review decisions without finalizing human-owned canon.
generated_from: User task: Claim Ledger local-first slice
validation_command: & { $files = @("public/review/index.html", "tools/fff-state.mjs", "artifacts/artifact-manifest.json", "artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md", "artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json", "artifacts/claim-ledger-smoke-result.json", "artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png", "docs/review/current-status.md", "docs/review/claim-ledger-review.md", "docs/data-model.md"); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { Write-Error ("Missing files: " + ($missing -join ", ")); exit 1 }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne "fff-claim-ledger-001") { throw "Manifest artifact id mismatch" }; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/claim-ledger-smoke-result.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw "Claim Ledger smoke result did not pass" }; foreach ($jsonFile in @("artifacts/sample-project-state.json", "artifacts/current-project-state.json")) { $state = Get-Content $jsonFile -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($state.schemaVersion -ne "fff.projectState.v1") { throw ("Bad schema version in " + $jsonFile) }; if (-not ($state.extractedCandidates.claims.Count -ge 8)) { throw ("Expected Claim Ledger claims in " + $jsonFile) } }; @("artifacts/fff-current-review-screenshot.png", "artifacts/fff-review-contact-sheet.png") | ForEach-Object { $item = Get-Item $_; if ($item.Length -le 0) { throw ("Empty visual artifact: " + $_) } }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw; @("fff-claim-ledger-001", "Visual Review Hub", "Claim Ledger", "Group claims", "By claim scope", "By world truth status", "By reality/reference status", "By canon risk", "By unresolved dependency", "By review status", "By source", "Unresolved dependencies only", "Canon risk high only", "Unverified reality status only", "Hidden from viewer only", "spoiler", "Toma fate", "brass moth truth", "Council motive") | ForEach-Object { if ($html -notmatch [regex]::Escape($_)) { throw ("Missing required text: " + $_) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; $summary = node tools/fff-state.mjs summarize artifacts/current-project-state.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not ($summary.claimSummary.totalClaims -ge 8)) { throw "Claim summary missing or too small" }; Write-Output "Claim Ledger validation passed" }
